1.name: Predator's Communion
1.description: Learn of the presence and relative strength of any beasts near you.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 97
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 189

2.name: Invoking the Predator
alias: Invoking the Beast . Taming the Beast : Gain bonuses to physical actions by drawing on the Beast
2.description: Temporarily grow a minor animal feature, such as claws, poison gland, exoskeleton, among others.

2.name: Taming the Beast
2.description: Gain bonuses to physical actions by drawing on the Beast .

3.name: Unseen Hibernation
3.description: Meld into a natural piece of terrain to rest. Whistling up the Beast : Unsettle a target and make it harder for them to resist Frenzy .
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 98
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 189

3.name: Whistling up the Beast
3.description: Unsettle a target and make it harder for them to resist Frenzy .

4.name: Power from Darkness
4.description: Focus the Beast's power into specific parts of your body for a variety of effects.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 190
Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 98

5.name: Predator's Transformation
5.description: tion : Assume the shape of a predatory animal you have killed.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 99
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 190

6.name: Incarnate Darkness
6.description: ( V20DA ) Infuse oneself with the darkness and become the ultimate predator.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 191

6.description: tery : Intimidate a creature into obeying you. Incarnate Darkness : ( V20DA ) Infuse oneself with the darkness and become the ultimate predator.
